domainPort.description: Port the primary domain routes to (defaults to the image's first exposed port).

domainService.description: Compose service the primary domain routes to (compose deployments).

gitToken.description: Personal access token for a private repo (encrypted at rest).

targetService.description: Compose service this domain routes to; null = the deployment's default container.

targetPort.description: Internal port this domain routes to; null = the deployment's web service port.

cpus.description: Logical CPU count reported by the Docker daemon.

token.description: Token for a private repo (not stored).

spaceReclaimedBytes.description: Bytes reclaimed by pruning dangling images.

removedImageTags.description: Stale per-deployment image tags that were removed.

size.description: Actual on-disk size of the image in bytes.

virtualSize.description: Virtual size including shared layers, in bytes.

created.description: Unix timestamp when the image was created.

activeContainersCount.description: Number of containers based on this image.

spaceReclaimedBytes.description: Bytes reclaimed by the prune operation.

itemsRemoved.description: Number of images or containers removed.

image.description: Image tag or ID the container was started from.

state.description: Docker state: running, exited, created, paused, …

created.description: Unix timestamp when the container was created.
